customManagers.description: Tie the JDK feature version (the Maven global.jdkVersion compiler property and every setup-graalvm java-version input) to the GraalVM Community native-image image tag. The image tag IS the JDK feature version GraalVM ships native-image for, so the JDK only advances to a version that can still produce native binaries.

packageRules.description: Bump the JDK version (pom + workflows) together with the GraalVM Containerfile base image in one coordinated PR, restricted to whole-number JDK feature releases (the image's major tags) so floating/variant tags like 'latest' or 'muslib-*' are never selected.
